intent: Every generated skill is precisely scoped, actionable, and honest about its edges — the cross-skill quality floor Tier 1 structure alone does not guarantee.

dimensions.name: activation-precision
dimensions.criterion: States when to activate AND names when NOT to, so the router never fires it on an adjacent skill's job.

dimensions.name: actionable-workflow
dimensions.criterion: Has a concrete workflow that records a run artifact, not just prose.

dimensions.name: grounded-examples
dimensions.criterion: Shows at least one worked example rather than only abstract description.

dimensions.name: failure-awareness
dimensions.criterion: Documents its own failure modes / gotchas.

dimensions.name: integration-declared
dimensions.criterion: Declares how it hands off to and from other skills.
